goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should go to 'london kings cross'.
The train should leave on 'tuesday' and should 'leave after 15:45'.
Make sure you get 'arrival time' and 'travel time'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre' and should be in the type of 'museum'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee' and 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge

The train should leave on tuesday and should leave after 15:45
Make sure you get arrival time and travel time
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre and should be in the type of museum
Make sure you get entrance fee and phone number
